global.description: The ad features a vibrant orange background with product icons and promotional text.
global.main_message: Promoting a 2-for-1 late-night deal from FreshDash.

elements.label: Orange background
elements.description: A solid orange background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant and warm base for the ad.

elements.label: Three product icons
elements.description: Three rectangular icons with a glossy finish, representing products, are arranged horizontally in the center.

elements.label: Product icon
elements.description: A single rectangular icon with a glossy finish, featuring a slight reflection, positioned to the left of the main subject.

elements.label: Product icon
elements.description: Another rectangular icon with a glossy finish, similar to the previous one, positioned to the right of the main subject.

elements.label: Product icon
elements.description: The last rectangular icon with a glossy finish, completing the trio of product representations in the center.

elements.label: Order now button
elements.description: A rounded rectangular button with bold text that reads 'Order now', positioned towards the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: Late-night deals text
elements.description: Text in a clean, modern font stating 'Late-night deals available', positioned below the main subject.

elements.label: Late-night deals text
elements.description: Another line of text in a clean font, reinforcing the late-night theme, positioned below the main subject.

elements.label: Main offer text
elements.description: Bold text stating '2-for-1 tonight', prominently displayed in the center of the ad.

elements.label: FreshDash logo
elements.description: The logo 'FreshDash' in a modern font, positioned at the top left corner of the ad.

elements.label: Price tag
elements.description: Text displaying the price '€9.99' in a clear font, located towards the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small circular badge with the text 'SALE' in a contrasting color, positioned at the top right corner.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, banner, bright and modern, 2-for-1 offer, FreshDash logo.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top left, the headline is centered, product icons are in the middle, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: 2-for-1 tonight, Late-night deals available, FreshDash, Order now, €9.99, SALE
